Featured Projects

Wazuh + YARA Active Response
Detection / Automation
Automated malware scanning + quarantine system integrated into Wazuh Active Response. Designed for low false positives, operational logging, and safe isolation workflows.

Home SOC Lab Infrastructure
Networking / Virtualization
Segmented home lab with firewall rules, isolated networks, monitoring, and internal services. Built for security testing and resilience.
